prompt: Generate 8 different styles of 'power button ON' icon based on the 'power button OFF' icon in the image for reference.
prompt_refined: Generate 8 distinct visual styles of 'power button ON' icons. Each icon should be inspired by the structure and simplicity of the 'power button OFF' icon in image 1 (a red circle with a white power symbol, open at the bottom). For each 'ON' icon, depict the active power state, potentially by completing the circle, changing its color (e.g., to green or a glowing effect), or adding other indicators of power. Ensure variety in the aesthetic styles of the 8 generated icons, such as minimalistic, glossy, metallic, flat, neon, or gradient designs.
objects: Power symbol (vertical line and curved element) within each icon
Circular or near-circular shape for each icon
Indicators of active power state for each icon (e.g., completed circle, green color, glowing effect)
Minimalistic style power button ON icon
Glossy style power button ON icon
Metallic style power button ON icon
Flat style power button ON icon
Neon style power button ON icon
Gradient style power button ON icon
